tests.name: free usage available
tests.why_it_matters: The user must be able to try the core value before the paywall.
tests.recommended_next_action: Use browser smoke to confirm the first free action succeeds.

tests.name: free usage counter decreases
tests.why_it_matters: The free meter must show what the user has left before the paywall appears.
tests.recommended_next_action: Consume one free action and confirm the remaining count updates.

tests.name: free limit reached
tests.why_it_matters: The popup must block only after the configured free limit is exhausted.
tests.recommended_next_action: Run repeated core actions and confirm the paywall appears at the right threshold.

tests.name: upgrade URL opens external tab
tests.why_it_matters: The extension must not host card entry or embed provider secrets.
tests.recommended_next_action: Browser smoke should verify the placeholder checkout URL opens.

tests.name: no secret in extension bundle
tests.why_it_matters: Provider secrets must never ship in the extension.
tests.recommended_next_action: Run monetization:security-scan on the run before any upload.

tests.name: license input UI works
tests.why_it_matters: The user must be able to activate or restore access without editing config files.
tests.recommended_next_action: Open the extension license page and verify input, activate, and restore actions.

tests.name: license page opens
tests.why_it_matters: The popup must expose both initial activation and restore or verify paths clearly.
tests.recommended_next_action: Click both popup license buttons and confirm the license page opens.

tests.name: mock active entitlement unlocks Pro
tests.why_it_matters: Test mode needs a safe way to verify paid unlock behavior without a real payment backend.
tests.recommended_next_action: Use the test hook to set a mock active entitlement and confirm the usage cap is bypassed.

tests.name: invalid license shows error
tests.why_it_matters: The user must see clear invalid, expired, or revoked states.
tests.recommended_next_action: Exercise invalid and revoked fixture responses from the payment system.

tests.name: offline grace behavior
tests.why_it_matters: The paid experience should survive short outages without trusting storage forever.
tests.recommended_next_action: Verify cached active entitlements degrade only after offline grace expires.

tests.name: local storage fields safe
tests.why_it_matters: The extension should store masked or hashed license metadata only.
tests.recommended_next_action: Inspect chrome.storage.local during smoke and confirm no full provider secret or raw license vault is stored.

tests.name: local-only claim visible
tests.why_it_matters: The user must understand the local-only trust boundary before paying.
tests.recommended_next_action: Verify the popup and privacy page keep the trust claim visible.

tests.name: no payment secret in source or dist
tests.why_it_matters: Public or placeholder endpoints are allowed, but secrets are not.
tests.recommended_next_action: Run monetization:security-scan against the commercial run.

tests.name: listing paid disclosure present
tests.why_it_matters: The store listing must truthfully disclose limits and paid unlocks.
tests.recommended_next_action: Verify listing copy mentions the free limit, paid features, and external payment page.
